CustomField.description: Optional explainer rendered in a popover when the user hovers/clicks the card's ⓘ icon. Use this to spell out the data source, calculation, or any caveats so the audience understands what the card is showing.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Plain text. Renders as a tooltip-style popover on the card. ⓘ icon only appears when this is set.
CustomField.label: Info Popover
